data.title: Three Altcoins Skyrocket in Hours After Going Live on Top US Crypto Exchange Coinbase
data.description:
A decentralized oracle provider and two artificial intelligence (AI)-focused altcoins surged just hours after going live on top US-based crypto exchange platform Coinbase. The data reveals that Chainlink (LINK) rival Pyth Network (PYTH) and AI-based projects Kaito (KAITO) and Bittensor (TAO) all saw significant increases in price after gaining support from Coinbase. source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/21/three-altcoins-skyrocket-in-hours-after-going-live-on-top-us-crypto-exchange-coinbase/

data.title: India’s SuperGaming Launching B3 Gamechain via Ethereum’s Base Network
data.description:
The B3 gaming network on Ethereum layer-2 Base will host a dedicated chain built by Indian game publisher SuperGaming.
source: https://decrypt.co/307325/india-supergaming-b3-gamechain-ethereum-base

data.title: ByBit Lost 70% Of Ethereum Holdings To Hacker, Says CEO
data.description:
Investigator ZachXBT says the hack was pulled off by the North Korean Lazarus Group, connecting it on chain to the Phemex hack.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/bybit-lost-70-of-ethereum-holdings-to-hacker-says-ceo/

data.title: Franklin Templeton files for Solana spot ETF, joining 5 other hopefuls
data.description:
Franklin Templeton has joined the asset managers waiting in line for approval of a Solana spot exchange-traded fund (ETF). It filed an S-1 form with the United States Securities Exchange Commission (SEC) on Feb. 21. The asset manager registered a Solana trust in the state of Delaware on Feb. 11. That trust will form the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/franklin-templeton-solana-spot-eft-joining-5/

data.title: North Korean Hackers Linked To Bybit Attack, Reports Arkham
data.description: According to PANews, Arkham has announced that blockchain investigator ZachXBT has provided substantial evidence linking the recent attack on Bybit to the North Korean hacker group Lazarus Group. The report submitted by ZachXBT includes a detailed analysis of test transactions and connected wallets used before the exploit, along with several forensic charts and timeline analyses. This information has been shared with the Bybit team to aid in their ongoing investigation.

data.title: Senators press SEC for clarity on crypto ETP staking restrictions
data.description:
A group of US senators, led by Cynthia Lummis, has urged the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to clarify its position on protocol staking in crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs) in a Feb. 20 letter.  The lawmakers are seeking answers regarding the exclusion of staking from ETP issuers’ S-1 filings, which they argue impacts the competitiveness […]
The post Senators press SEC for...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/senators-press-sec-for-clarity-on-crypto-etp-staking-restrictions/

data.title: Mainland China courts rule crypto has no legal currency or protection status in investor dispute
data.description:
China’s Jiangsu Provincial High People’s Court recently released information about a foreign-related case involving a 15.74M yuan cryptocurrency contract gone bad between Singaporean investor, Pan Moumou and Chinese citizen, Tian Moumou.  China’s regulation of cryptocurrencies has always been strict. While citizens of China are allowed to own and trade digital currencies, the country does not...
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mainland-china-no-legal-crypto-protection/

data.title: Solana Crypto Secures Fresh Boost as Sol Strategies Welcomes New Milestone
data.description:
On February 20, Sol Strategies announced that it had been selected as a staking provider for Tetra Trust. This is a notable achievement for the firm, known as Canada’s first licensed digital asset trust company. This alliance could significantly boost the Solana (SOL) crypto ecosystem.
